blurb: Lostness is less about distance than about being missed. The shepherd here does not grumble at the extra work; he is joy-scarred by what would be missing had even one remained astray. Each repentant soul adds another gleam to the banquet feast, and every little celebration echoes the larger one at the heart of God. Go find your next sheep today—you may discover the rejoicing starts the moment you set out.

verses.text: Now all the publicans and sinners were coming near unto him, to hear him.
And the Pharisees and scribes murmured, saying, This man receiveth sinners, and eateth with them.
And he spake this parable unto them, saying,
What man of you, having an hundred sheep, if he lose one of them, doth not leave the ninety and nine in the wilderness, and go after that which is lost, until he find it?
